title: Analytic Wave Optics
description: A displaced five-wave ocean whose geometry and analytic normal share one parameter bundle, augmented by derivative-filtered micro-bands, side-aware Fresnel, analytic sky reflection, screen-space refraction, Beer-Lambert fallback absorption, crest-linked foam, forward scatter, and distance haze.
techniques: shared five-wave displacement and normal evaluation
crest-linked foam and analytic sky reflection
